checks.observed: #dark-mode-toggle flipped html[data-theme] to light immediately on More.
Swept /he, quiz, review, flashcards, schedule all had data-theme=light with light backgrounds.
Light theme persisted across navigation between swept pages via theme cookie.
Body text rgb(28,35,55) on background rgb(245,247,252) on swept pages.
Quiz option selection states remained visually distinct in light mode during spot-check.
Sign images and tab icons visible on light backgrounds during sweep.
Toggling back on More returned data-theme=dark immediately.
No console errors during theme sweep.
Headings and button names unchanged in light theme.
Hebrew copy unchanged; no layout clipping from light palette.

findings.title: Browser theme-color meta stays dark when light theme is active
findings.expected: theme-color matches light palette when data-theme=light.

limitations: Quiz correct/wrong feedback not fully exercised both ways
